key_risks: Soft May ISM Manufacturing (June 1) or Services (June 3) triggers risk-off in high-beta tech/semis
Sticky 3.8% headline CPI and 5.01% 30y yield drive a duration/growth-stock selloff
Momentum factor crowding leads to sharp reversal/rotation into value or defensives
Oil/commodity weakness signals demand concerns spilling into cyclicals
Geopolitical or Taiwan-related shock hitting semiconductor supply chain sentiment

portfolio.rationale: Strongest momentum with chip sales +79% YoY, AI capex surging 75% in 2026, and 5.6% weekly gain shows persistent trend.
Momentum factor up 4.13% last week and 13.92% monthly; trend persistence favored with VIX at 16 and easing financial conditions.
Tech sector +4.63% weekly, +18% monthly; AI infrastructure spend and software pricing tailwinds intact through window.
FY2027 defense budget +28% with $1.5T request; ITA +5.57% weekly momentum into ISM week.
Hedge against ISM disappointment and sticky 3.8% CPI; gold futures firming despite weekly dip.

portfolio_rationale: Tilt into dominant AI/semis/tech momentum complex which has strongest near-term flows and earnings tailwinds, complemented by defense beneficiary of budget cycle and small gold hedge. Avoids weak energy/crypto/China and rate-sensitive defensives lagging.
rationale_summary: Ride the semis-tech-momentum leadership through ISM prints June 1/3 while VIX is contained and Fed is on hold; small gold hedge for inflation/macro tail.
